paths.name: node:fs
paths.message: Domain modules read and write files through the FileSystem port (ctx.ports.fs); only adapters and the composition root touch node:fs. See DEVELOPMENT.md §Hexagonal architecture.

paths.name: node:child_process
paths.message: Domain modules run external commands through a port (the CLI's Vcs is the model); only adapters spawn processes. See DEVELOPMENT.md §Hexagonal architecture.
